mapper.select: select id,username,password_hash passwordHash,phone,nickname,status,created_at createdAt from users where username=#{username}

select id,username,password_hash passwordHash,phone,real_name realName,vehicle_plate vehiclePlate,vehicle_type_id vehicleTypeId,service_area serviceArea,audit_status auditStatus,status,created_at createdAt from drivers where username=#{username}
select id,username,password_hash passwordHash,real_name realName,created_at createdAt from admins where username=#{username}
select id,username,phone,nickname,status,created_at createdAt from users where id=#{id}

select d.id,d.username,d.phone,d.real_name realName,d.vehicle_plate vehiclePlate,d.vehicle_type_id vehicleTypeId,d.service_area serviceArea,d.audit_status auditStatus,d.status,vt.name vehicleTypeName,d.created_at createdAt from drivers d left join vehicle_types vt on d.vehicle_type_id=vt.id where d.id=#{id}
mapper.update: update users set status=#{status}, updated_at=now() where id=#{id}
update drivers set audit_status=#{status}, status=if(#{status}='DISABLED',0,1), updated_at=now() where id=#{id}
mapper.select: select id,user_id userId,name,detail,lng,lat,contact_name contactName,contact_phone contactPhone,created_at createdAt from user_addresses where user_id=#{userId} order by id desc
mapper.delete: delete from user_addresses where id=#{id} and user_id=#{userId}
mapper.select: select id,name,description,base_price basePrice,per_km_price perKmPrice,load_capacity loadCapacity,sort_order sortOrder,enabled from vehicle_types where enabled=1 order by sort_order,id
select id,name,description,base_price basePrice,per_km_price perKmPrice,load_capacity loadCapacity,sort_order sortOrder,enabled from vehicle_types order by sort_order,id
select id,name,description,base_price basePrice,per_km_price perKmPrice,load_capacity loadCapacity,sort_order sortOrder,enabled from vehicle_types where id=#{id}
select * from pricing_rules order by id
select * from pricing_rules where rule_key=#{ruleKey} and enabled=1
mapper.insert: insert into pricing_rules(rule_key,rule_value,description,enabled) values(#{ruleKey},#{ruleValue},#{description},#{enabled}) on duplicate key update rule_value=values(rule_value),description=values(description),enabled=values(enabled),updated_at=now()
mapper.select: select o.id,o.user_id userId,o.driver_id driverId,o.vehicle_type_id vehicleTypeId, o.start_address startAddress,o.start_lng startLng,o.start_lat startLat,o.end_address endAddress,o.end_lng endLng,o.end_lat endLat, o.item_description itemDescription,o.start_has_elevator startHasElevator,o.end_has_elevator endHasElevator,o.start_floor startFloor,o.end_floor endFloor, o.large_item_count largeItemCount,o.appointment_time appointmentTime,o.contact_name contactName,o.contact_phone contactPhone,o.distance_km distanceKm, o.estimated_amount estimatedAmount,o.final_amount finalAmount,o.status,o.payment_status paymentStatus,o.cancel_reason cancelReason, o.created_at createdAt,o.updated_at updatedAt,u.nickname userNickname,d.real_name driverName,d.phone driverPhone,d.vehicle_plate vehiclePlate, vt.name vehicleTypeName from move_orders o left join users u on o.user_id=u.id left join drivers d on o.driver_id=d.id left join vehicle_types vt on o.vehicle_type_id=vt.id where o.id=#{id}

select o.id,o.user_id userId,o.start_address startAddress,o.end_address endAddress,o.appointment_time appointmentTime, o.final_amount finalAmount,o.status,o.created_at createdAt,vt.name vehicleTypeName from move_orders o left join vehicle_types vt on o.vehicle_type_id=vt.id where o.status='WAITING_ACCEPT' order by o.id desc

select o.id,o.user_id userId,o.driver_id driverId,o.start_address startAddress,o.end_address endAddress,o.appointment_time appointmentTime, o.final_amount finalAmount,o.status,o.payment_status paymentStatus,o.created_at createdAt,u.username userName,d.real_name driverName,vt.name vehicleTypeName from move_orders o left join users u on o.user_id=u.id left join drivers d on o.driver_id=d.id left join vehicle_types vt on o.vehicle_type_id=vt.id o.status=#{status} order by o.id desc
mapper.update: update move_orders set driver_id=#{driverId},status='ACCEPTED',accepted_at=now(),updated_at=now() where id=#{orderId} and status='WAITING_ACCEPT' and driver_id is null

update move_orders set status=#{to},updated_at=now(), arrived_at=if(#{to}='ARRIVED_LOADING',now(),arrived_at), moving_at=if(#{to}='MOVING',now(),moving_at), moved_at=if(#{to}='MOVED',now(),moved_at), completed_at=if(#{to}='COMPLETED',now(),completed_at) where id=#{orderId} and status=#{from}
update move_orders set status='CANCELED',cancel_reason=#{reason},updated_at=now() where id=#{orderId} and status in ('WAITING_ACCEPT','ACCEPTED')
update move_orders set status='CANCELED',cancel_reason=#{reason},updated_at=now() where id=#{orderId} and status!='COMPLETED'
update move_orders set payment_status='PAID',status='COMPLETED',completed_at=now(),updated_at=now() where id=#{orderId} and status='MOVED' and payment_status='UNPAID'
mapper.select: select id,order_id orderId,operator_role operatorRole,operator_id operatorId,from_status fromStatus,to_status toStatus,remark,created_at createdAt from order_status_logs where order_id=#{orderId} order by id
select id,order_id orderId,user_id userId,driver_id driverId,rating,content,hidden,created_at createdAt from reviews where order_id=#{orderId}

select r.id,r.order_id orderId,r.user_id userId,r.driver_id driverId,r.rating,r.content,r.hidden,r.created_at createdAt,u.username userName,d.real_name driverName from reviews r left join users u on r.user_id=u.id left join drivers d on r.driver_id=d.id order by r.id desc
mapper.update: update reviews set hidden=#{hidden},updated_at=now() where id=#{id}
mapper.select: select count(*) completedCount, ifnull(sum(final_amount * 0.4),0) totalIncome, sum(case when date(completed_at)=curdate() then 1 else 0 end) todayCount, ifnull(sum(case when date_format(completed_at,'%Y-%m')=date_format(now(),'%Y-%m') then final_amount * 0.4 else 0 end),0) monthIncome from move_orders where driver_id=#{driverId} and status='COMPLETED'

select (select count(*) from move_orders where driver_id=#{driverId}) as totalOrders, (select count(*) from move_orders where driver_id=#{driverId} and status='COMPLETED') as completedOrders, (select count(*) from move_orders where driver_id=#{driverId} and status in ('ACCEPTED','ARRIVED_LOADING','MOVING','MOVED')) as runningOrders, (select ifnull(sum(final_amount * 0.4),0) from move_orders where driver_id=#{driverId} and status='COMPLETED') - (select ifnull(sum(penalty_amount),0) from complaints where driver_id=#{driverId} and action_type='DEDUCT') as totalIncome, (select ifnull(sum(final_amount * 0.4),0) from move_orders where driver_id=#{driverId} and status='COMPLETED' and date(completed_at)=curdate()) - (select ifnull(sum(penalty_amount),0) from complaints where driver_id=#{driverId} and action_type='DEDUCT' and date(updated_at)=curdate()) as todayIncome, (select ifnull(sum(final_amount * 0.4),0) from move_orders where driver_id=#{driverId} and status='COMPLETED' and date_format(completed_at,'%Y-%m')=date_format(now(),'%Y-%m')) - (select ifnull(sum(penalty_amount),0) from complaints where driver_id=#{driverId} and action_type='DEDUCT' and date_format(updated_at,'%Y-%m')=date_format(now(),'%Y-%m')) as monthIncome, (select count(*) from reviews r join move_orders o on r.order_id=o.id where o.driver_id=#{driverId} and r.rating<=2 and r.hidden=0) as lowRatingComplaintCount, (select count(*) from complaints c where c.driver_id=#{driverId} and c.status in ('OPEN','IN_PROGRESS')) as complaintTicketOpenCount, (select count(*) from complaints c where c.driver_id=#{driverId}) as complaintTicketTotalCount

select date_format(completed_at,'%Y-%m-%d') day, count(*) cnt, ifnull(sum(final_amount * 0.4),0) income from move_orders where driver_id=#{driverId} and status='COMPLETED' and completed_at >= date_sub(curdate(), interval 6 day) group by date_format(completed_at,'%Y-%m-%d') order by day desc
select id,audience,title,content,enabled,created_at createdAt,updated_at updatedAt from announcements order by id desc
mapper.update: update announcements set enabled=#{enabled}, updated_at=now() where id=#{id}
mapper.select: select id,audience,title,content,enabled,created_at createdAt,updated_at updatedAt from announcements where audience=#{audience} and enabled=1 order by id desc limit 50
select id,driver_id driverId,doc_type docType,file_url fileUrl,original_name originalName,created_at createdAt from driver_documents where driver_id=#{driverId} order by id desc
select id,driver_id driverId,doc_type docType,file_url fileUrl,original_name originalName,created_at createdAt from driver_documents where driver_id=#{driverId} order by id desc
mapper.update: update users set phone=#{phone}, nickname=#{nickname}, updated_at=now() where id=#{userId}
update drivers set real_name=#{realName}, phone=#{phone}, vehicle_type_id=#{vehicleTypeId}, vehicle_plate=#{vehiclePlate}, audit_status='PENDING', updated_at=now() where id=#{driverId}
mapper.select: select id,order_id orderId,user_id userId,driver_id driverId,title,content,image_url imageUrl,status,action_type actionType,penalty_amount penaltyAmount,admin_remark adminRemark,created_at createdAt,updated_at updatedAt from complaints where order_id=#{orderId}

select c.id,c.order_id orderId,c.title,c.content,c.image_url imageUrl,c.status,c.action_type actionType,c.penalty_amount penaltyAmount,c.admin_remark adminRemark,c.created_at createdAt, o.start_address startAddress,o.end_address endAddress,o.final_amount finalAmount,o.status orderStatus from complaints c join move_orders o on c.order_id=o.id where c.user_id=#{userId} order by c.id desc

select c.id,c.order_id orderId,c.title,c.content,c.image_url imageUrl,c.status,c.action_type actionType,c.penalty_amount penaltyAmount,c.admin_remark adminRemark,c.created_at createdAt, o.start_address startAddress,o.end_address endAddress,o.final_amount finalAmount,o.status orderStatus from complaints c join move_orders o on c.order_id=o.id where c.driver_id=#{driverId} order by c.id desc
mapper.update: update complaints set status=#{status}, admin_remark=#{adminRemark}, action_type=#{actionType}, penalty_amount=#{penaltyAmount}, updated_at=now() where id=#{id}
mapper.select: select count(*) from complaints where driver_id=#{driverId} and status in ('OPEN','IN_PROGRESS')
select id,username,phone,nickname,status,created_at createdAt from users order by id desc

select (select count(*) from move_orders) totalOrders, (select count(*) from move_orders where date(created_at)=curdate()) todayOrders, (select count(*) from drivers) driverCount, (select count(*) from users) userCount, (select ifnull(sum(final_amount),0) from move_orders where status='COMPLETED' and date(completed_at)=curdate()) todayIncome
select date_format(created_at,'%Y-%m-%d') day, count(*) cnt from move_orders where date(created_at) >= date_sub(curdate(), interval 6 day) group by date_format(created_at,'%Y-%m-%d') order by day asc
